steps.t: Málvang can be found along the road to Laerlad, far to the south of Hultvís. Desperate to uncover anything that may have survived the War, Madelgard h…
You should investigate the burned dwellings.
Footprints can be found in each of the burned dwellings at Málvang. You have discovered a number of fresh footprints in the burned dwellings at Málvan…
Madelgard can be found in Hultvís. You have not found anything that survived the War except for a singed, plundered strongbox and curiously small foot…
